name: IdsEdwMbrDntlRwrdAccumDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_main AS (SELECT MDRA.MBR_DNTL_RWRD_ACCUM_SK, MDRA.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MDRA.YR_NO AS MBR_ACCUM_YR_NO, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, MDRA.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MDRA.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MDRA.GRP_SK, MDRA.MBR_SK, MDRA.PLN_YR_EFF_DT, MDRA.PLN_YR_END_DT, MDRA.ANUL_PD_AMT, MDRA.ANUL_PD_RWRD_THRSHLD_AMT, MDRA.AVLBL_RWRD_AMT, MDRA.AVLBL_BNS_AMT, MDRA.USE_RWRD_AMT, MDRA.USE_BNS_AMT, MDRA.OUT_OF_NTWK_CLM_CT, CAST(@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CHAR) AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CAST(@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CHAR) AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CAST(@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS INT) AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CAST(@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS INT) AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR_DNTL_RWRD_ACCUM MDRA LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON MDRA.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE MDRA.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}) SELECT MBR_DNTL_RWRD_ACCUM_SK, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MBR_ACCUM_YR_NO, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, GRP_SK, MBR_SK, PLN_YR_EFF_DT, PLN_YR_END_DT, ANUL_PD_AMT, ANUL_PD_RWRD_THRSHLD_AMT, AVLBL_RWRD_AMT, AVLBL_BNS_AMT, USE_RWRD_AMT, USE_BNS_AMT, OUT_OF_NTWK_CLM_CT, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_main
